content.en:
Wind Tooth Island.

Ye Tian was in a very good mood, this time not only caused heavy losses to the Shadow Ruins, but also destroyed their headquarters, killing and injuring a large number of Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestors, and they couldn't recover from it for endless years.

By the time Shadow Ruins had recovered some of their strength, at that time he had already surpassed Shadow Ruins, and could directly kill the three Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestors of Shadow Ruins.

"This time, I got some resources from the Shadow Ruins, some of which can help me a little, I can improve a little bit of the origin of the other side, and the blood cave demon vine liquid, try the effect. "

Ye Tian swallowed some of the Blood Cave Demon Vine Liquid in one gulp and slowly refined it.

Then.

He found that the Blood Cave Demon Vine Liquid had the effect of increasing the origin of the other side, and the effect was quite good.

"If the three Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestors of the Shadow Ruins take out the Blood Cave Demon Vine Liquid and refine it all, they will still be able to improve some of the Origin of the Other Shore and increase some of their strength. "

Of course, Ye Tian also knew that it was impossible for them to do this.

Once this is done, the Blood Cave Demon Vine is useless.

And every 100 million primeval epochs, the Blood Cave Demon Vine will give birth to a Blood Cave Demon Fruit, which is a treasure that helps the Origin Middle Realm to impact the Origin Upper Realm, and if you are lucky, a Origin Upper Realm will be born, greatly increasing the strength of the Shadow Ruins.

Such a precious thing, they are reluctant to give it up.

But now, the Blood Cave Demon Vine Liquid is cheaper.

In the following years, Ye Tian worked hard to refine the resources obtained from the Shadow Ruins, and also refined those blood cave demon vine liquids, and his other origin was gradually increasing.

Unconsciously, Ye Tian's other origin was getting closer and closer to the level of 10 million.

Gradually, hundreds of thousands of primeval years passed.

this day.

Ye Tian's cultivation has broken through and reached the middle stage of the Origin Upper Realm, which also means that his other origin has reached more than 10 million.

Subsequently.

He tested it himself, and sure enough, it exceeded 10 million, but it was only just in its infancy.

When he cultivated to the middle stage of the Origin Upper Realm, his strength naturally increased a little, but his improvement was limited, and he had not yet reached the kind of qualitative change.

However, in terms of combat power, he has currently reached the strength of the powerful Origin Upper Realm, and has not yet reached the top Origin Upper Realm combat power.

Of course, compared to the Lord of the Wind Fangs, he should still be slightly worse.

But even the Lord of the Wind Teeth has not reached the top Origin Upper Realm combat power.

......

Origin Black River.

Kowloon Seamount.

This is a treasure place of the Origin Black River, and it is also a very dangerous place.

Jiulong Haishan has nine blue-scaled dragons, each of which has the strength of a powerful Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestor, such a terrifying strength is far from being an opponent even if it is Wind Tooth Island Leaf!

The Green Scale Dragon occupies a very rare resource - the Chaos Green Tree!

This kind of chaotic ruin green tree helps to comprehend the origin rules of the other side, if the chaotic ruin green tree is refined to produce the chaotic ruin green liquid, the effect is countless times better, and even has a huge help to the origin rules of the other side of the ninety out of four.

Because of this, many Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestors wanted to obtain the Chaos Green Tree.

It's a pity that the Green Scale Dragon is too powerful, and the nine Green Scale Dragons can join forces and even compete with the top Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestor.

In addition, the Blue Scale Dragon occupied the Nine Dragons Sea Mountain, where the strength of suppressing the Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestor from the outside world was a local advantage for them.

Of course.

The Origin Upper Realm Overlord could easily kill them, but there was no need for that, the Chaos Green Tree was of no use to those Origin Upper Realm Overlords, and they wouldn't come to do this.

As a result, these nine blue-scaled dragons have been occupying the Nine Dragons Sea Mountain like this.

After Ye Tian learned the information of the green tree in the ruins, he came to Jiulong Haishan.

......

"Nine Dragons and Seamounts are just these nine blue-scaled dragons, I can't copy other creatures to blend in, this method is useless. "

Ye Tian pondered for a long time.

He wasn't going to inform the Lord of the Wind Fangs of them, the Lord of the Wind Fangs couldn't help him when they came, and he didn't dare to follow him to fight the nine green scale dragons.

In short, this matter can only be done on his own.

Soon, he thought of a way, which was to forcibly fight these nine green scale dragons.

In terms of strength, he is indeed weaker.

However, he has a replica body!

He could completely let his replica body fight these Qinglin Dragons, constantly consuming their power, and then copy his own body and fight these Qinglin Dragons again.

Over time, these Qinglin Dragons will definitely be injured and gradually collapse, so that they will be killed by him.

When the time comes, he can snatch the green tree of the ruins.

"This method is feasible, so use this method!"

Soon.

Ye Tian's five replica bodies entered the Nine Dragons Sea Mountain.

Rumble!!!!

Nine blue-scaled dragons appeared, and their breath locked on Ye Tian.

However, they were still a little surprised, they found that Ye Tian's five replica bodies were exactly the same, they thought they were wrong at first, but after a closer look, they were indeed exactly the same five replica bodies.

They thought it was the secret technique of an Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestor, but they didn't take it too seriously.

But as Ye Tian made a move, the battle began, and they found that the five replica bodies were all real, and their strength was exactly the same.

Thundered!!!

The battle began!!!!

Ye Tian was directly beaten by these nine green scale dragons, but Ye Tian's copy body was also desperate, burning the origin, trying his best to urge the other side of the supreme treasure and perform the other side of the supreme technique, just to cause a little damage to these nine green scale dragons.

Soon, one of Ye Tian's replica bodies fell, but it did cause damage to one of the blue-scaled dragons.

Soon after.

Ye Tian copied five more replica bodies and attacked these blue-scaled dragons again.

In this way, every once in a while, Ye Tian would come to attack the Green Scale Dragon, making the injuries of the other Green Scale Dragons more and more serious.

Finally, after a period of time, one of the blue-scaled dragons died at Ye Tian's hands.

After that, Ye Tian used the same method to deal with the other blue-scaled dragons.

Time flies.

These blue-scaled dragons were completely collapsed by Ye Tian, and they were killed by Ye Tian one by one.

At last.

All nine blue-scaled dragons fell and died.

"Finally killed these nine blue-scaled dragons!"

Ye Tian breathed a sigh of relief and said.

After that, he came to the chaotic green tree guarded by the nine blue-scaled dragons.

He directly took the chaos in front of the green tree, and then took it away.

He didn't want to stay here, if he was seen by the Origin Realm of other forces, it would be a little troublesome.

Soon.

Ye Tian took this chaotic green tree away and brought it to Fengya Island.

After coming to Fengya Island, Ye Tian began to refine the green tree of the ruins.

As time passed, drops of mixed ruin green liquid were refined.
